data.title: U.S. workers get smallest share of GDP since 1947 as Fed’s Barkin points to persistent low hiring
data.description:
U. S. workers are taking home the smallest slice of GDP since records began in 1947, according to new federal data. Numbers from the Bureau of Labor Statistics show that the share of economic output paid to workers through wages and salaries dropped sharply in the third quarter of last year. The figure landed at 53. 8%, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/u-s-workers-smallest-share-of-gdp-since-1947/

data.title: Trump’s $200 billion MBS purchase directive boosts mortgage bond prices and homebuilder stocks
data.description:
President Trump has told Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac to buy $200 billion worth of mortgage-backed securities, putting the White House directly into housing finance and pushing mortgage rates lower. That decision jolted the market, cut risk premiums on new mortgage bonds, and sent homebuilder stocks higher. This isn’t coming from the Federal Reserve. It’s […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trumps-mbs-directive-mortgage-bond-prices/

data.title: France frees alleged Russian hacker wanted by US for crypto ransom attacks
data.description:
Authorities in France have released a Russian national accused by the United States of participating in hacking attacks on companies for ransom in cryptocurrency. The man has been exchanged for a French citizen held in Russian custody, instead of being handed over to the U. S. The swap has been compared to the Griner case. Russian […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/france-frees-alleged-russian-hacker-wanted-by-us-for-crypto-ransom-attacks/

The launch followed the conclusion of the PepeNode presale, which began in August 2025 and raised $2. 7 million. Within minutes of the Uniswap listing, the PEPE
source: https://theholycoins.com/news/pepenode-token-launch-on-uniswap-ends-with-90-price-drop-minutes-after-january-8-listing

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Warns Against Prosecuting Software Developers in Tornado Cash Case
data.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has publicly intervened ahead of the sentencing of Tornado Cash developer Roman Storm, warning that prosecutors are punishing software creation rather than demonstrable financial harm. The appeal was published Friday, January 9, 2026, as Storm awaits a decision that could carry prison time.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/vitalik-buterin-warns-against-prosecuting-software-developers-in-tornado-cash-case/

data.title: Apple stock hits eight-day losing stretch not seen in over 30 years
data.description:

Shares dropped 0. 8% on Friday to close at $257. 07. That’s the eighth day in a row of losses going back to December […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/apple-stock-eight-day-losing-in-30-years/
